how_to_play_intro: DigitMile is an educational game designed to help students improve their mathematical skills through interactive gameplay.
getting_started_step_1: Ask your teacher for your classroom key
getting_started_step_2: Enter the classroom key when prompted
getting_started_step_3: Select your name from the student list
game_controls_step_1: Use your mouse to interact with game elements
need_help_text: Contact your teacher if you're having trouble accessing the game or if you forgot your classroom key.
access_info_intro: This game is part of the DigitMile educational platform managed by your teacher.
for_students_step_1: You must be registered by your teacher
for_students_step_2: Use the classroom key provided by your teacher
for_students_step_4: Teachers can view your statistics and performance
for_teachers_step_1: Log in to the teacher panel to manage classrooms
for_teachers_step_3: Generate classroom keys for student access
for_teachers_step_4: View detailed statistics and progress reports
teacher_portal_text: Teachers can access the management panel at /panel/ to create classrooms and track student progress.
about_paragraph_1: DigitMile combines engaging gameplay with educational content to create a fun learning environment. Students progress through various levels, solving mathematical challenges while competing in an interactive game format.
about_paragraph_2: Teachers can monitor student progress in real-time, viewing detailed statistics including accuracy rates, completion times, and learning curves. This data-driven approach helps identify students who may need additional support or are ready for more advanced challenges.
about_paragraph_3: The game is designed to be accessible and enjoyable for students of all skill levels, adapting to individual learning paces while maintaining engagement through competitive elements and achievement tracking.
